title: Analyse measurements and estimate uncertainties
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Analyse measurements and estimate uncertainties demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Identify the measured quantity and the uncertainty components

pcs.text: Specify an equation for the measurement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify an equation for the measurement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify an equation for the measurement.

pcs.text: List uncertainty components that are associated with each input in the equation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can List uncertainty components that are associated with each input in the equation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can List uncertainty components that are associated with each input in the equation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify the measured quantity and the uncertainty components

elements.title: Determine the size of each uncertainty component

pcs.text: Calculate the standard deviations and standard deviation of the mean from the repeated measurement results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the standard deviations and standard deviation of the mean from the repeated measurement results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the standard deviations and standard deviation of the mean from the repeated measurement results.

pcs.text: Use calibration reports, manufacturer’s specifications, quality control and validation data, and experimental data to collect other available information on the uncertainty components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use calibration reports, manufacturer’s specifications, quality control and validation data, and experimental data to collect other available information on the uncertainty components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use calibration reports, manufacturer’s specifications, quality control and validation data, and experimental data to collect other available information on the uncertainty components.

pcs.text: Assign degrees of freedom to each uncertainty component
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign degrees of freedom to each uncertainty component?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign degrees of freedom to each uncertainty component.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine the size of each uncertainty component

elements.title: Reduce each uncertainty component to a standard uncertainty

pcs.text: Allocate an appropriate distribution for each uncertainty component
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate an appropriate distribution for each uncertainty component?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate an appropriate distribution for each uncertainty component.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the standard uncertainties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the standard uncertainties.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Reduce each uncertainty component to a standard uncertainty

elements.title: Calculate an expanded uncertainty to the required confidence level

pcs.text: Calculate the sensitivity coefficient for each uncertainty component and multiply each standard uncertainty by its sensitivity coefficient and ensure they are all expressed in the unit of the output
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the sensitivity coefficient for each uncertainty component and multiply each standard uncertainty by its sensitivity coefficient and ensure they are all expressed in the unit of the output?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the sensitivity coefficient for each uncertainty component and multiply each standard uncertainty by its sensitivity coefficient and ensure they are all expressed in the unit of the output.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate a combined standard uncertainty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate a combined standard uncertainty.

pcs.text: Determine an appropriate coverage factor based on the estimated effective degrees of freedom
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine an appropriate coverage factor based on the estimated effective degrees of freedom?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine an appropriate coverage factor based on the estimated effective degrees of freedom.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the expanded uncertainty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the expanded uncertainty.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Calculate an expanded uncertainty to the required confidence level

elements.title: Report the expanded uncertainty

pcs.text: Report the measurement result and uncertainty to an appropriate number of significant figures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report the measurement result and uncertainty to an appropriate number of significant figures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report the measurement result and uncertainty to an appropriate number of significant figures.

pcs.text: Report the confidence level and coverage factor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report the confidence level and coverage factor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report the confidence level and coverage factor.

pcs.text: Determine the appropriateness of the size of the expanded uncertainty relative to the tolerance or required accuracy of the test
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the appropriateness of the size of the expanded uncertainty relative to the tolerance or required accuracy of the test?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the appropriateness of the size of the expanded uncertainty relative to the tolerance or required accuracy of the test.

pcs.text: Determine the fitness for purpose of the expanded uncertainty relative to the use of the measurement result
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the fitness for purpose of the expanded uncertainty relative to the use of the measurement result?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the fitness for purpose of the expanded uncertainty relative to the use of the measurement result.
